title: paspalum orbiculatum
intro: Paspalum orbiculatum, also known as Pitted Muhly Grass, is a type of grass found in tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, Paspalum orbiculatum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
